title: SkyLuxe
description: A lightweight sky texture pack that upgrades Minecraft’s sky with cleaner visuals and a more immersive vibe—simple, beautiful, and performance-friendly.
body:
Transform your world with this custom sky texture pack for Minecraft. This pack enhances the in-game sky with high-quality visuals, smoother gradients, and a more immersive atmosphere. Whether you're exploring, building, or just watching the sunset, the improved sky adds depth and beauty to every moment.

Designed to blend naturally with the game while still standing out, this pack keeps performance smooth and works well with most shaders and resource packs. Perfect for players who want a fresh, aesthetic look without changing the core feel of Minecraft.
